summary: Comprehensive testing of Ghost-driver cybersecurity dashboard completed. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend core functionality operational with excellent cybersecurity design. Minor session management issues during navigation.

integration_issues.issue: Session redirects back to login during direct URL navigation to admin panel

passed_tests: Backend: All 17 API endpoints working (100% success)
Frontend: Login page loads with cybersecurity theme
Frontend: Dashboard displays status cards and live stats correctly
Frontend: Config page feature toggles (ESP, RCS, Triggerbot) working
Frontend: Config page sliders (Smoothing, FOV) functional
Frontend: Sidebar navigation visible and themed
Backend: Invite request and approval workflow
Backend: Invite key generation and management
action_item_for_main_agent: Investigate frontend session management during navigation - JWT token may be expiring or not persisting properly in browser storage during route changes. Admin panel features work via API but may have frontend navigation issues.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (core features working, minor session issues)
